comments:
Geometry pillar ‚Äî shapes, paths, and spatial primitives.

## Import Pattern

Import submodules directly with qualified names:

```purescript
import Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Angle as Angle
import Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Radius as Radius
import Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Point (Point2D, point2D)

-- No conflicts: Angle.full vs Radius.full
rotation :: Angle.Degrees
rotation = Angle.quarter

corners :: Radius.Corners
corners = Radius.cornersAll Radius.md
```

## Submodules

### Foundation
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Angle` ‚Äî Angular units (Degrees, Radians, Turns)
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Point` ‚Äî 2D and 3D points
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Vector` ‚Äî 2D and 3D vectors
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Position` ‚Äî Position primitives

### 2D Shapes
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Arc` ‚Äî Circular arcs
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Bezier` ‚Äî Cubic and quadratic Bezier curves
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Circle` ‚Äî Circle primitives
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Ellipse` ‚Äî Ellipse primitives
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Path` ‚Äî SVG-style path commands
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Polygon` ‚Äî N-sided polygons
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Shape` ‚Äî Shape union type
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Triangle` ‚Äî Triangle primitives

### 3D Shapes
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Box3` ‚Äî 3D bounding boxes
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Frustum` ‚Äî View frustums
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Mesh2D` ‚Äî 2D mesh tessellation
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Plane` ‚Äî Infinite planes
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Ray` ‚Äî Ray primitives for casting
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Sphere` ‚Äî Sphere primitives

### Coordinate Systems
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Polar` ‚Äî 2D polar coordinates (r, Œ∏)
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Cylindrical` ‚Äî 3D cylindrical coordinates (r, Œ∏, z)
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Spherical` ‚Äî 3D spherical coordinates (r, Œ∏, œÜ)

### Advanced Curves
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Spline` ‚Äî Catmull-Rom and B-Spline curves
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Nurbs` ‚Äî Non-Uniform Rational B-Splines (NURBS)

### Transforms
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Transform` ‚Äî 2D affine transforms
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Transform3D` ‚Äî 3D transforms
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Quaternion` ‚Äî Rotation quaternions
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Symmetry` ‚Äî Symmetry operations

### Styling
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Border` ‚Äî Border definitions
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.AnimatedBorder` ‚Äî Animated border transitions
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.CornerRadii` ‚Äî Per-corner radius values
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Radius` ‚Äî Border radius scale
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Spacing` ‚Äî Margin and padding
- `Hydrogen.Schema.Geometry.Stroke` ‚Äî Stroke styling

This module exists as documentation. Import submodules directly.
